title: The Train Cars Become a Battlefield
description: Sanji works his way through the Sea Train, turning the rescue mission into a fight inside enemy territory.
scene: Across pages 17, 18, this part follows Sanji, Franky, Nico Robin, Spandam, CP9 agent. Sanji works his way through the Sea Train, turning the rescue mission into a fight inside enemy territory.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Hey!! Where do you think you're going!!?

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: Did she say the back streets!?

dialogue.speaker: Nero
dialogue.text: Don't you want to stay alive!!?

summary: Sanji works his way through the Sea Train, turning the rescue mission into a fight inside enemy territory.
